subcodes.first_line: The knights of the arena of inner meanings and utterance must in truth be occupied this day with service to the Cause of the Best-Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فارسان مضمار معانی و بیان الیوم باید بخدمت امر محبوب عالمیان مشغول باشند براستی
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
